column12: Measurement condition : Ice; Clear , No Precipitation , Calm Wind Swirling/Variable
column14: DRILLED 3 HOLES AT THE PREVIOUS MEASUREMENT LOCATION AND HIT ROCKS AND GROUND.  SO WENT 50 M DOWNSTREAM AT A  PARTIALLY OPEN SECTION. CHIPPED AND REMOVED ICE TO CREATE AN OPEN LEAD.  FT2 WADE WITH TOP SETTING ROD, SAME MEASUREMENT SECTION AS PREVIOUS WINTERS OPEN WADING SECTION, SETTING ON FT2 LEFT AT 0.5 BECAUSE COMPLETE ICE COVER IS ONLY 1 M UPSTREAM, @ Uncertainty: IVE method, 2-sigma value (2 x Uncertainty Value reported in *.ft File). @ DRILLED HOLE TILL ROCKS WERE HIT,  THEN CHIPPED TO GET WATER, WATER SLOWLY FILLED THE HOLE, OFFSET 0.0360 NO RESET Mid-section
HG: 0.577 No Reset (NR)

THIN BRIDGED ICE ON NORMAL WINTER SECTION. SMALL SECTION OF VERY THIN/OPEN WATER APPROX 50M DS OF CONTROL AROUND BEND @ Uncertainty: IVE method, 2-sigma value (2 x Uncertainty Value reported in *.ft File). @ OFFSET=0.036 SECOND DWL TAKING BY OBTAINING A SECOND CUT. column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Partly Cloudy , No Precipitation , Calm Wind Blowing Upstream
column14: Some boulders present in channel and mauy have caused negative panels. Measurement compelted at usual summer measurement location. FT2 time was noted to be 11 minutes faster, this was compensated in Mean Gauage Height correction. Start and end time on of measurement was adjested back 11 minutes to line up with Logger data. AVR of Stage logger data taken to calculate MGH Mid-section
HG: 0.906 No Reset (NR)
HG: 1.150 No Reset (NR)
HG: 0.608 No Reset (NR)

Measurement was conducted 20m DS of Bridge. Could not accessnormal winter measurement location due to snow amounts. 2 panels greater than 10 %, 0.25 meters spacing completed. Left bank flow was minimul, lots of Quality control warnings on left and Rigth bank. Most flow constricted to middle of river. MGH unavailable due to station not transmitting, Q measurement will be used to draw winter recession.
HG: 0.660 SRC: 0.003 No Reset (NR)

Winter measurement spot had very thin ice and could not access entire channel. Had to do measurement approx 30m upstream from winter measurement spot. This spot was the same measurement location as last winters measurements. This measurement spot is on a slight bend. Some reverse flow noted on right bank for approx 3m.
HG: 0.909 SRC: 0.004 No Reset (NR)

Flowtracker mmt at usual mmt location. some weed growth at mmt section on left bank.   Corrected M.G.H. includes Sensor Reset Correction of 0.004 and Gage Correction of 0.000 applied to Weighted M.G.H of 0.910 Mid-section
GC: 0.000 HG: 0.662 SRC: -0.004 No Reset (NR)

Flowtracker 2 wading measurement done approximately 300 metres downstream of gauge  Corrected M.G.H. includes Sensor Reset Correction of -0.004 and Gage Correction of 0.000 applied to Weighted M.G.H of 0.662 Mid-section
HG: 0.777 SRC: -0.004 No Reset (NR)

HG: 0.712 SRC: 0.002 No Reset (NR)

Corrected M.G.H. includes Sensor Reset Correction of 0.002 and Gage Correction of 0.000 applied to Weighted M.G.H of 0.712 Mid-section

Times manually adjusted in Ehsn.  Corrected M.G.H. includes Sensor Reset Correction of -0.053 and Gage Correction of 0.000 applied to Weighted M.G.H of 0.879 orifice 0.778, offset 0.042 Mid-section
